title: chrysanthemum quercifolium
intro: Chrysanthemum quercifolium, also known as the Oak-leaf chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where its leaves and flowers are valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum quercifolium include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Chrysanthemum quercifolium can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
